reviews.review_title: This is hands down the best gtag horror
reviews.review_description: The style, the setting, the monsters, everything about this game is just SO GOOD. This game is the definition of hidden gem. Heck, I even met the owner and he is so chill and nice!
I love how this game has different monsters WITH voice lines and I love the lore of this game its designs and its maps overall 9.5/10
I go around playing gtag horror games, and this one is my favorite. The style of the game is great, the animations are great, everything is great. I also love NFX’s voice.
Cool game but the Devs are Horrible and Moderators even worse
I met the owner he is so chill and why does no one play this game

The fallen is a very good game with friends with amazing monsters designs, Real big maps to explore, and amazing game overall. Also the customization is really great with every cosmetic being free. The only downside is that your kinda slow but it’s fine if you know how to run fast. Another plus to the game is when me and my friends were playing we met the owner of the game. Sucks that the game has no players tho
Absolute cinema, cool monsters and maps but maybe lower the mic volume.
